title: Fluffy Lazy Sunday Thai Jerusalem Artichoke Stir-fry
description: This earthy and fluffy Thai dish features roasted Jerusalem artichokes that are perfect for a lazy Sunday meal.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced or minced into small pieces

instructions: Score the skin of the Jerusalem artichokes with a few shallow cuts, then wrap them in aluminum foil.
Roast the Jerusalem artichokes for about 45-60 minutes or until they are tender and golden brown. Remove from oven.
While the artichokes are roasting, mince garlic and chop green onions into chiffonade.
In a wok or large skillet, heat some oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not burnt.
Add roasted Jerusalem artichokes to the wok along with chopped green onions, fresh cilantro, soy sauce, and fish sauce.
Stir everything together well and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until heated through. Serve hot.
